name: Aisling Bea
blurb: Aisling Bea is an Irish comedian, actress and screenwriter who won the So You Think Youre Funny award at the Edinburgh Fringe in 2012, only the second woman to do so.
bio: Aisling Bea is an Irish comedian, actress and screenwriter who won the So You Think Youre Funny award at the Edinburgh Fringe in 2012, only the second woman to do so. Her stand-up is fast, animated and personal, and she is a regular on British comedy panel shows. She created, wrote and starred in the Channel 4 series This Way Up.

timeline.ev: Decides to try stand-up while filming the sitcom Dead Boss
Wins the So You Think Youre Funny award at the Edinburgh Fringe
Nominated for Best Newcomer at the Edinburgh Comedy Awards for Cest La Bea
Wins the British Comedy Award for Best Female TV Comic
Writes and stars in the Channel 4 series This Way Up
Wins the BAFTA Craft Award for Breakthrough Talent for This Way Up

accolades: So You Think Youre Funny award (2012)
British Comedy Award for Best Female TV Comic (2014)
BAFTA Craft Award for Breakthrough Talent (2020)
